summary_findings: Hotel Royal Stay is currently underperforming across AI-driven travel discovery queries. Visibility collapses on family, budget and pet-friendly intents while luxury coverage remains moderate.
optimize_discovery_signals: Implement a structured data schema and knowledge graph optimization strategy to ensure LLMs correctly categorize this property's unique value propositions and surface it in high-intent travel queries.
key_insight: Visibility is strongest in wellness and luxury intents, dropping sharply for family and budget queries.

summary_findings: Solid guest communication tools and moderate AI coverage. Marketing AI is underutilised — segmentation runs on manual lists rather than behavioural triggers.
optimize_discovery_signals: Replace manual Mailchimp segments with behavioural email triggers and connect the PMS to your CRM for real-time guest profile enrichment so LLMs can cite up-to-date experience signals.
key_insight: Discovery scores are improving but family and business-traveller prompts still skip this property entirely.

summary_findings: Market-leading AI stack with near-full automation across revenue, ops and guest experience. Minor gaps in data governance and cross-system de-duplication.
optimize_discovery_signals: Extend Quicktext to WhatsApp Business API for pre-arrival upsells, pilot sentiment-analysis alerts linked to housekeeping SLAs, and establish a data governance policy to deduplicate guest profiles across Revinate and OHIP.
key_insight: Visibility is strong across luxury and wellness intents; remaining gap is concentrated in family-multi-gen prompts.
